title: Productize Vibe Skills as structured mobile task templates
outputs: Each Vibe Skill exposes structured intent, outcome, risk level, primary action, and next-step metadata
Mobile skills sheet displays the metadata before the user drafts or sends a prompt
Frontend tests verify that skills are product templates rather than opaque prompt shortcuts
do_not_do: Do not change WebSocket protocol behavior
Do not add new runtime-specific assumptions
Do not dispatch skills when prompt capability is unavailable
Do not stage unrelated untracked files
